issues.title: Link without accessible name
issues.description: Links must have meaningful text or an accessible name.
issues.recommendation: Provide descriptive link text or an aria-label.

issues.title: Link without accessible name
issues.description: Links must have meaningful text or an accessible name.
issues.recommendation: Provide descriptive link text or an aria-label.

issues.title: Link without accessible name
issues.description: Links must have meaningful text or an accessible name.
issues.recommendation: Provide descriptive link text or an aria-label.

issues.title: Link without accessible name
issues.description: Links must have meaningful text or an accessible name.
issues.recommendation: Provide descriptive link text or an aria-label.

issues.title: Link without accessible name
issues.description: Links must have meaningful text or an accessible name.
issues.recommendation: Provide descriptive link text or an aria-label.

issues.title: Form control missing label
issues.description: Form inputs must have associated labels or accessible names.
issues.recommendation: Add a <label> associated with the control or an aria-label.

issues.title: No skip navigation link found
issues.description: Skip links help keyboard users bypass repetitive content.
issues.recommendation: Add a skip link at the beginning of the page: Skip to main content

issues.title: Missing main landmark
issues.description: Pages should include a main landmark region.
issues.recommendation: Add a <main> element or element with role="main" for the main content.

issues.title: Image used for text content
issues.description: Using images instead of text can cause scaling and maintenance problems.
issues.recommendation: Use CSS and HTML text formatting instead of images for text content.

issues.title: Inconsistent link text for same destination
issues.description: Same destination referenced with different link text.
issues.recommendation: Use consistent link text for the same destination across the website.

issues.title: Vague link text found
issues.description: 3 link(s) use non-descriptive text like "click here" or "more".
issues.recommendation: Write descriptive link text that describes destination/action. Avoid "click here".
